findings.description: The knowledge file adds `</field:block>` closing tag before `</n:form>` in the JSP code sample. This tag does not exist in the source code. The source example omits it, and the knowledge file silently corrects this, misrepresenting the actual source example.
findings.source_evidence: Source ends the field:block content with `</field:text>` then immediately `</n:form>` and `</spec:layout>` — no `</field:block>` appears anywhere in the source code block.
